352.code: Token token = new Token(tokenMap.get("&&"), tokenRow, tokenCol, sb.toString());
352.reason: [Error: When a single '&' is encountered (error case), the code still creates a token with type AND ("&&") and adds it to the token list. According to the problem description, for erroneous source programs, only the error should be recorded and output to error.txt; no token should be generated for the erroneous character. This causes incorrect output in the lexer.txt file.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered (error case), the code still creates a token with type AND ("&&") and adds it to the token list. According to the problem description, for erroneous source programs, only the error should be recorded and output to error.txt; no token should be generated for the erroneous character. This causes incorrect output in the lexer.txt file.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：当单个'&'出现时，即使已经添加了错误，仍然会生成一个类型为AND的token，但根据题目要求，单个'&'应被视为错误，不应生成token。同时，sb.toString()此时只包含单个'&'，但token类型却是AND，导致输出不一致。]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should not add a token for a single '&' because it is an error; the token type AND is invalid for a lone '&']
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  [When a lexical error is detected, a token should not be generated and added to the token list. This line should only execute when no error occurs.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Uses curCol instead of tokenCol, which points to the wrong position after goNext(). Also, this token is added unconditionally even when a lexical error occurs.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [即使遇到单个 '&' 错误，仍错误地将其当作 "&&" 类型（AND）加入 tokenList，应跳过 token 生成]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [即使遇到单个 '&'（非法），仍将其当作 "&&" 类型加入 tokenList，这会导致错误的 token 被输出；应仅在合法时添加 token，非法时只报错不生成 token]

406.code: Token token = new Token(tokenMap.get(str), tokenRow, tokenCol, str);
406.reason: [当 str 不是合法操作符时（如单个 '&' 或 '|' 已被上面处理，但其他非法符号如 '@'），tokenMap.get(str) 返回 null，导致 Token 的 tokenType 为 null，后续 toString() 可能出错；但本题错误类型 a 的核心问题是：在报错后仍生成了错误的 token]
